arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich could shift focus to Xavi Simons if Florian Wirtz pursuit fails
arts.sum: If Wirtz extends his contract with Leverkusen, Bayern Munich could quickly shift its focus to RB Leipzig’s Xavi Simons (as if you needed another reason to watch Friday’s match): Bayern are eyeing Xavi Simons as plan B should Florian Wirtz extend his contract at Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs RB Leipzig
arts.sum: An exciting encounter will kick off this weekend’s round of fixtures as Bayern Munich welcome RB Leipzig to the Allianz Arena on Friday. Vincent Kompany’s side continue to occupy top…

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayern Munich vs RB Leipzig XIs
arts.sum: In the opening match of the final matchday before the winter break, Bayern Munich host RB Leipzig as both teams look to end the year on a high. Both teams…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany prepared for stiff test from RB Leipzig as winter break looms
arts.sum: We’re playing at home and we want to win,” Kompany said (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ). Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany would have preferred his team entered Friday’s showdown with RB Leipzig on a winning note, but last weekend’s loss to Mainz 05 could have served as a wake up call.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Pep Guardiola has now privately told Man City about signing Joshua Kimmich
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's thoughts on signing Joshua Kimmich have been revealed 🚨

arts.ttl: Harry Kane set for Bayern return vs Leipzig - Vincent Kompany
arts.sum: Bayern Munich's leading goalscorer Harry Kane is on track to return from injury in Friday's Bundesliga clash with RB Leipzig at home, coach Vincent Kompany said on Thursday. Kompany said he was glad to see Davies, Kane and Josip Stanisic back in training and hoped others would return during the three-week winter break which is starting from Saturday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane eyeing longevity in international football
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s Harry Kane has been on fire for his club and country, racking up both goals and assists. Speaking about the 2026 World Cup, the Bayern Munich star dismissed the idea that it could be his final tournament with England.

arts.ttl: Leipzig updates: Raum to return to squad, Bayern game comes too soon for Xavi
arts.sum: David Raum is set to return to the RB Leipzig squad for the clash with Bayern Munich, but the game comes too soon for Xavi Simons.

arts.ttl: Is Manuel Neuer too old? Bayern Munich goalkeeper facing extra scrutiny because of his age
arts.sum: The 38-year-old Neuer was sent off for the first time in his long career on Dec. 3 when Bayern was knocked out of the German Cup by defending champion Bayer Leverkusen. Neuer still enjoys the full confidence of Bayern’s powerbrokers, with sporting director Max Eberl saying on Thursday the club and player were making progress on talks to extend his contract.

arts.ttl: Bayern and Neuer set to iron out "final details" on new deal, Eberl confirms
arts.sum: Max Eberl has confirmed that Bayern Munich are close to agreeing a new contract with Manuel Neuer.
